title: Wisdom WIS057P Toothpaste, Step by Step 0-3 Years, Cavity and Enamel Defense Fluoride, 75 mL
description: Product Description Wisdom Step by Step 0-3 Toothpaste Ingredients Aqua, sorbitol, hydrated silica, glycerin, cellulose gum, sodium lauryl sulfate, sodium monofluorophosphate, aroma, sodium methylparaben, sodium saccharin, limonene, sodium hydroxide, ci 77891, contains: 0.76 percent w/w sodium monofluorophosphate (1000 ppm F). Directions Dentists recommend parents brush their children's teeth twice a day. Remove tamper evident seal from tube before use. Apply a smear of toothpaste on the brush for children under 3 years. Ensure children spit out remaining paste after brushing to minimise swallowing. Safety Warning Children under 3 years use a smear of toothpaste for supervised brushing to minimise swallowing. In case of intake of fluoride from other sources consult a doctor or dentist. Children should be taken to visit the dentist every 6 months for regular check-ups and advice on what is best for their teeth. Box Contains 1 x Wisdom Step by Step 0-3 Years Fluoride Toothpaste 75 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Wisdom Toothbrushes Ltd., Haverhill, England, CB9 8DT. See more
